title: Sue Nord
compiled_truth: Sue Nord is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-10-25 to 2002-01-28), Sue Nord sent 118 and received 754 emails, totalling 872 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (87), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (78), [Scott Bolton](people/scott-bolton) (61), [Lara Leibman](people/lara-leibman) (54), [Margo Reyna](people/margo-reyna) (53). Mailbox folders observed: 2001_budget, 2001_budget__cost_cutting, 2001_objectives, compliments, deleted_items, inbox.
